stages.objective: Observe filesystem operation flow before invariant validation.
stages.goal: Identify trace evidence needed to justify invariant expectations.
stages.theory_detail: Invariant checks validate correctness beyond simple process completion.

hints.concept: A run can complete and still violate invariants.
hints.explicit: Verify path/mapping flow, then inspect fs_ok outcome.

stages.objective: Diagnose invariant pass/fail causes from trace and outputs.
stages.goal: Pass fs_ok and required companion checks.

hints.concept: Invariant failures indicate correctness bugs, not performance variance.
hints.explicit: Reset, rerun carefully, and submit only when fs_ok and completion both pass.

stages.objective: Apply tuning while preserving invariant correctness.
stages.goal: Keep fs_ok true under bounded tuning edits.

hints.concept: Correct systems preserve invariants across timing variation.
hints.explicit: Apply one change, rerun full workload, and verify fs_ok before submit.
